steps.code:
<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/media.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';

$placeholders = [
  'muji-residence' => ['bg' => 'e8e0d6', 'fg' => '8c7e6f', 'text' => 'Muji+Residence'],
  'nordic-studio'  => ['bg' => 'd4c5b3', 'fg' => '2c2825', 'text' => 'Nordic+Studio'],
  'hinoki-retreat'  => ['bg' => 'c4a882', 'fg' => 'f5f0eb', 'text' => 'Hinoki+Retreat'],
];

foreach ( $placeholders as $slug => $opts ) {
  $posts = get_posts(['post_type' => 'project', 'name' => $slug, 'posts_per_page' => 1]);
  if ( empty($posts) ) continue;
  $post = $posts[0];
  if ( get_post_thumbnail_id($post->ID) ) continue;
  $url = 'https://placehold.co/1200x900/' . $opts['bg'] . '/' . $opts['fg'] . '/png?text=' . $opts['text'];
  $id = media_sideload_image($url, $post->ID, $opts['text'], 'id');
  if ( !is_wp_error($id) ) set_post_thumbnail($post->ID, $id);
}
?>
